functions.name: aivl_play

arguments.name: localization_key
arguments.description: The key of the voiceline's text in the localization spreadsheet. The translation spreadsheet can be found in [WYS INSTALL LOCATION]\WILL YOU SNAIL LOCA\Legal WYS Loca - Main.tsv

arguments.name: only_play_after
arguments.description:
A value that cooresponds to how much time must have passed since the previous voicelines was played.  
3 = play immediately, 2 = seven seconds minimum, 1 = three seconds minimum.

functions.description: A basic function to play one of squid's voicelines. For more advanced functionality, see [aivl_play_ext](/WYSCE_Documentation/functions/aivl_play_ext) and other aivl_play functions.

functions.name: modhelper_comment

arguments.name: comment
arguments.description: The string that is to show up for modders in the decompiled code.

functions.description: This function does nothing, it is generously used by the developers in a few spots in the game to explain how things work in some parts of decommpiled code. It's basically a replacement for a comment, since those don't save to decompilable code.

functions.name: modhelper_create_struct
functions.description: This function was useful back when UndertaleModTool didn't support structs, all it does is return an empty struct. Now that UMT supports structs it is useless unless you're using an older version like the old mod loader "GMSL" does.

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_xflip
functions.description: Returns a HORIZONTAL FLIP tool property to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_yflip
functions.description: Returns a VERTICAL FLIP tool property to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_xscale

arguments.name: f_min
arguments.description: The minimum x scale of the object

arguments.name: f_max
arguments.description: The maximum x scale of the object

arguments.name: f_scroll_steps
arguments.description: The amount that the slider in the editor's settings UI steps by

functions.description: Returns a HORIZONTAL SCALE tool property to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_yscale

arguments.name: f_min
arguments.description: The minimum y scale of the object

arguments.name: f_max
arguments.description: The maximum y scale of the object

arguments.name: f_scroll_steps
arguments.description: The amount that the slider in the editor's settings UI steps by

functions.description: Returns a VERTICAL SCALE tool property to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_scale

arguments.name: f_min
arguments.description: The minimum scale of the object

arguments.name: f_max
arguments.description: The maximum scale of the object

arguments.name: f_scroll_steps
arguments.description: The amount that the slider in the editor's settings UI steps by

functions.description: Returns an OBJECT SCALE tool property to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_rotation
functions.description: Returns an OBJECT ROTATION tool property to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_rotation_90
functions.description: Returns an OBJECT ROTATION (locked to 90-degree increments) tool property to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_int

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The identifier the editor object is saved/loaded/referred to as internally

arguments.name: copy_property_to_placed_obj
arguments.description: Whether or not to copy the property to a newly placed object

arguments.name: int_min
arguments.description: The minimum value of the property

arguments.name: int_max
arguments.description: The maximum value of the property

arguments.name: loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the NAME of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

arguments.name: icon
arguments.description: The icon of the property in the editor settings UI

arguments.name: default_value
arguments.description: The default value of the property

arguments.name: looltip_loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the TOOL TIP of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

functions.description: Returns an INTEGER tool property to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_flag

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The identifier the editor object is saved/loaded/referred to as internally

arguments.name: copy_property_to_placed_obj
arguments.description: Whether or not to copy the property to a newly placed object

arguments.name: loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the NAME of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

arguments.name: icon
arguments.description: The icon of the property in the editor settings UI

arguments.name: default_value
arguments.description: The default value of the property

arguments.name: looltip_loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the TOOL TIP of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

arguments.name: array_loca_values
arguments.description: The id of the NAMES OF THE INDIVIDUAL OPTIONS/CHECKBOXES of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

functions.description: Returns a FLAG tool property (a multiple checkbox UI such as the "what triggers a trigger" properties) to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_int_as_string

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The identifier the editor object is saved/loaded/referred to as internally

arguments.name: copy_property_to_placed_obj
arguments.description: Whether or not to copy the property to a newly placed object

arguments.name: loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the NAME of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

arguments.name: icon
arguments.description: The icon of the property in the editor settings UI

arguments.name: default_value
arguments.description: The default value of the property

arguments.name: looltip_loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the TOOL TIP of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

arguments.name: array_loca_values
arguments.description: The id of the NAMES OF THE INDIVIDUAL OPTIONS/CHECKBOXES of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

functions.description: Returns an integer-based tool property (that shows up in-game as a slider that picks between strings) to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_sprite

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The identifier the editor object is saved/loaded/referred to as internally

arguments.name: loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the NAME of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

arguments.name: icon

arguments.name: default_value
arguments.description: The default value of the property

arguments.name: looltip_loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the TOOL TIP of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

arguments.name: array_sprite_picking_functions
arguments.description: An array of FUNCTIONS that return which sprite is used for each option, NOT a direct array of the sprites themselves.

functions.description: Returns a SPRITE/TEXTURE tool property to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_float

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The identifier the editor object is saved/loaded/referred to as internally

arguments.name: copy_property_to_placed_obj
arguments.description: Whether or not to copy the property to a newly placed object

arguments.name: f_min
arguments.description: The minimum value of the property

arguments.name: f_max
arguments.description: The maximum value of the property

arguments.name: f_scroll_steps
arguments.description: The amount that the slider in the editor's settings UI steps by

arguments.name: multiply_for_display
arguments.description: How much the real value is multiplied before it is shown to the user in the settings UI. Useful to show an entire tile (60 pixels) as a 1 value.

arguments.name: loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the NAME of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

arguments.name: icon
arguments.description: The icon of the property in the editor settings UI

arguments.name: default_value
arguments.description: The default value of the property

arguments.name: looltip_loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the TOOL TIP of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

functions.description: Returns a FLOAT (decimal number) tool property to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_help

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The identifier the editor object is saved/loaded/referred to as internally

arguments.name: loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the NAME of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

arguments.name: icon

arguments.name: looltip_loca_string
arguments.description: The id of the TOOL TIP of the property in the localization spreadsheet. In Community Edition putting a string that ISN'T a localization ID will treat the id AS the string. In vanilla it returns an "invalid loca string" variant.

functions.description: Returns an tool property (used to display a "help/info" message giving info about the object) to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_xoff
functions.description: Returns a X OFFSET tool property to be added to an editor object in leveleditor_database_ini or modhelper_predatabase_override_me

functions.name: modhelper_createprop_yoff

functions.name: modhelper_predatabase_override_me
functions.description: This function does nothing by default, it is meant to be hooked onto by mods. Add custom objects to the global.li_level_editor_database ds list here!

functions.name: modhelper_preiconbase_override_me
functions.description: This function does nothing by default, it is meant to be hooked onto by mods. Add icons to the global.li_level_editor_icons ds list here!
